Transcript: Hello. This is John Manley. For 16 years I've had the privilege of serving you as your a member of parliament most recently as deputy prime minister. We have worked hard together to make Ottawa s an excellent place to live work and raise our families. But there's still more to do. That's why I am pleased that David McGuinty is running to be our next MP. I know David personally and he understands our community. He'll get things done. He'll be a member of parliament. We can all be proud of. Please make sure you vote for David McGuinty. Thank you.
